metadata.name: DiscoPanel
metadata.description: DiscoPanel is a game server panel for Minecraft. It provides a clean interface for creating and managing Minecraft servers, installing modpacks, and running each server as its own Docker container. Features include modpack browsing and installation, per-server configuration, backups, and real-time server management.
metadata.tagline: A game server panel for Minecraft
metadata.author: BigBearTechWorld

environment_variables.name: DISCOPANEL_DATA_DIR
environment_variables.description: Path inside the container where DiscoPanel stores its data

environment_variables.name: DISCOPANEL_HOST_DATA_PATH
environment_variables.description: Real host path of the data mount. DiscoPanel passes this to the Minecraft containers it spawns so they can bind-mount their worlds. Must match the host source of the /app/data bind mount.

volumes.description: Access to Docker socket for managing Minecraft server containers
DiscoPanel application data and Minecraft server worlds

before_install.en_us:
**Support BigBearTechWorld**: https://ko-fi.com/bigbeartechworld
**Community Forum**: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com

DiscoPanel manages Minecraft servers as Docker containers and runs with host networking so it can expose each server's port (25565+).

`DISCOPANEL_HOST_DATA_PATH` must match the host path of the data mount so the Minecraft servers DiscoPanel spawns can bind-mount their worlds. It defaults to `/DATA/AppData/discopanel/data`. If you change the data mount location, update this value to match.

**Security Note**: This app requires Docker socket access, which grants full Docker daemon privileges.

after_install.en_us: Access the web UI at http://your-server:8080
